ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the interaction */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic source */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used by the user */,
  "operative_system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operating system */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price associated with the interaction */,
  "converted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the interaction led to a conversion */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., click, view, add to cart) */,
  "page" TEXT /* The page or URL the user interacted with */,
  "referrer" TEXT /* The referrer URL or source of the interaction */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for browser and device details */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device used by the user */,
  "app_version" TEXT /* Version of the app (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_operative_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("operative_system_id") REFERENCES operative_systems ("operative_system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* User's city */,
  "state" TEXT /* User's state */,
  "country" TEXT /* User's country */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* User's zip code */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user is subscribed to newsletters */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last purchase */,
  "total_spent" TEXT /* Total amount spent by the user */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Referral code used by the user */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of the referral (e.g., friend, ad, social media) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the traffic source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the traffic source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., organic, paid) */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated campaign */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sources_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used by the user */,
  "operative_system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operating system */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "screen_resolution" TEXT /* Screen resolution of the device */,
  "battery_level" INTEGER /* Battery level of the device at the time of interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operative_systems" (
  "operative_system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operative system */,
  "operative_system_name" TEXT /* Name of the operative system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operative system */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  "is_mobile" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the operating system is mobile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operative_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the test */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the test */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  "test_group" TEXT /* Group of the test (e.g., control, variant A, variant B) */,
  "test_objective" TEXT /* Objective of the test */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price */,
  "price_value" TEXT /* Value of the price */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the price */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency */,
  "price_change_date" TEXT /* Date when the price was last changed */,
  "original_price" TEXT /* Original price before any discounts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction that led to the conversion */,
  "conversion_date" TEXT /* Date when the conversion occurred */,
  "conversion_type" TEXT /* Type of conversion (e.g., purchase, sign-up) */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated from the conversion */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the conversion */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the conversion (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversions_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES user_interactions ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated to the campaign */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source associated with the campaign */,
  "campaign_status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, paused, completed) */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of the campaign (e.g., email, social media, display) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience of the campaign */,
  "creative_assets" TEXT /* Creative assets used in the campaign (e.g., images, videos) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on the campaign */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions of the campaign */,
  "conversion_rate" TEXT /* Conversion rate of the campaign */,
  "return_on_investment" TEXT /* Return on investment for the campaign */,
  "cost_per_click" TEXT /* Cost per click */,
  "cost_per_conversion" TEXT /* Cost per conversion */,
  "click_through_rate" TEXT /* Click-through rate */,
  "engagement_rate" TEXT /* Engagement rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_performance_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "recommended_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended product */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_score" TEXT /* Score of the recommendation */,
  "recommended_by" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation (e.g., algorithm, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_recommended_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price associated with the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)
